---
name: Iterate Feature
description: Iterate on an existing feature — describe a UX problem and get a diagnosis and fix
agent: iterate
argument-hint: What's the problem? (e.g., cooking mode has bad ux, ingredients are hard to scan)
---

I want to iterate on an existing feature in the recipes app.

**The problem:** ${1:describe the UX issue in plain English}

Research the feature first, then show me 2-4 specific UX problems you found. Describe each problem as:

- What the user does
- What they expect
- What actually happens

Don't write any code yet — just show me the diagnosis so I can approve the direction.
